segments.text: Sing to the Lord a new song, And His praise in the assembly of saints.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let Israel rejoice in their Maker; Let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let them praise His name with the dance; Let them sing praises to Him with the timbrel and harp.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the Lord takes pleasure in His people;
He will beautify the humble with salvation.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Let the saints be joyful in glory; Let them sing aloud on their beds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Let the high praises of God be in their mouth, And a two-edged sword in their hand,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: To execute vengeance on the nations, And punishments on the peoples;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: To bind their kings with chains, And their nobles with fetters of iron;
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: To execute on them the written judgment— This honor have all His saints.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
